issues.description: Missing first effect: '[Your Turn] Give all of your opponent's Characters −5 cost.' This is a permanent/continuous effect that should have trigger 'StartOfTurn' or be modeled as a duration-based effect with 'DuringYourTurn'. The DSL only contains the [On Play] effect.
KO action missing 'maxQuantity' constraint. Text says 'up to 1' which requires maxQuantity:1 in the action.
